title: Enamelled Cast Iron Frying Pan 25cm – Heavy-Duty Skillet for Hob & Oven, Easy to Clean, All Hob Compatible, Ideal for Frying, Searing & Everyday Cooking, Garnet
features: Ideal for Everyday Frying, Searing & Browning – Perfect for frying eggs, crisping bacon, sautéing veg or searing fish, this 25cm frying pan is your daily go-to for quick and tasty stovetop meals
Durable Cast Iron with Enamel Coating – Built to last with heavy-duty construction and a smooth enamelled surface that enhances heat retention and distributes it evenly for perfect cooking results
Versatile Across All Hob Types & Oven Safe – Use on induction, gas, ceramic, or electric hobs, then transfer to the oven with ease. Oven safe up to 230°C for full flexibility from hob to table.
Easy to Clean with Enamel Coating – The enamel coating helps prevent sticking and makes cleanup hassle-free. Hand wash and dry thoroughly for long-lasting performance

Thoughtful, Safe Design with Practical Touches – Pouring spouts reduce mess. Use only with wooden or nylon utensils. Store dry and cook with confidence thanks to consistent heat control and long-lasting quality
description: From the manufacturer Features: Round Casserole Dish with Lid We offer in two c apacities 2.4 litres and 5.2 litres . The 2.4L dish is ideal for small-batch cooking, soups, and side dishes, while the 5.2L dish is perfect for family-sized stews, curries, and one-pot meals. Heavy-Duty Frying Pan This 25cm enamelled cast iron frying pan is suitable for all hob types and oven-safe up to 230°C. Perfect for everyday frying, searing, pouring spouts , and browning, it’s your go-to pan for quick and delicious stovetop meals. Heavy-Duty Grill Pan 23cm This Griddle Skillet features dual pouring spouts and a ribbed grilling surface , making it perfect for searing, grilling, and browning. Compatible with all hob types, it’s a must-have for BBQ enthusiasts and home grillers alike. Shallow Casserole Dish Best for One-Pot Family Meals & Slow Cooking Durable build with ergonomic side handles and wide base for family-sized portions. Multi-Hob & Oven Compatible Suitable for all hob types including induction, and oven safe up to 230°C. Seamlessly transition from stovetop to oven for versatile meal prep Even Heat Distribution with Cast Iron Construction Made from thick enamelled cast iron, this pan holds heat evenly and consistently, ideal for gentle simmering and long cook times without burning Hassle-Free Cleaning Enamelled interior wipes clean with ease. Simply hand wash and dry thoroughly, no harsh abrasives or dishwasher needed We offer a wide range of Prochef Enamelled Cast Iron cookware
